items.name: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano Super Dev Kit
items.description: 67 TOPS AI performance. Runs face recognition, gesture detection, SLAM, and navigation.

items.name: Arducam B0274 IMX477 IR-CUT (12.3MP)
items.description: Day/night camera with auto-switching IR filter. Same 12MP IMX477 sensor but can see in low light.

items.name: Arducam B0249 IMX477 HQ (12.3MP)
items.description: Standard version with fixed IR-cut filter. Excellent daytime image quality.

items.name: ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1 (N8R8)
items.description: Dual-core 240MHz, Wi-Fi + BLE 5.0, 8MB Flash + 8MB PSRAM. One for body motor control, one for head servos & LEDs.
items.note: Get N8R8 variant for extra PSRAM

items.name: Adafruit BNO055 IMU
items.description: 9-axis IMU with on-chip sensor fusion. Outputs quaternions directly. Recalibrates on power-on.

items.name: VL53L1X ToF Distance Sensors
items.description: Time-of-Flight laser ranging, 4m range, I2C. Mount 3-4 around drive unit for indoor obstacle avoidance.
items.note: Replaces D435i for simple indoor nav

items.name: 12V DC Gear Motors with Encoders
items.description: For the internal hamster-drive unit. Encoders give speed/position feedback for PID control.

items.name: Cytron MDD3A Dual Motor Driver
items.description: Dual channel, 3A continuous per channel. Clean PWM control.

items.name: TB6612FNG Dual Motor Driver
items.description: Budget alternative. 1.2A continuous (3.2A peak) per channel.

items.name: MG90S Micro Servos
items.description: Metal gear micro servos for head pan/tilt mechanism.

items.name: N52 Neodymium Disc Magnets (25mm × 10mm)
items.description: Ultra-strong rare earth magnets for head-to-body magnetic coupling.

items.name: Teflon / PTFE Balls (12mm)
items.description: Low-friction balls between head mount and body for smooth gliding.

items.name: 3S LiPo Battery (11.1V, 3000-5000mAh)
items.description: Main power for motors. 3S gives 11.1V nominal.

items.name: 5V/5A Buck Converter
items.description: Steps down LiPo voltage to power the Jetson Orin Nano.

items.name: LiPo Balance Charger (iMAX B6)
items.description: Safely charge your 3S LiPo with cell balancing.

items.name: Acrylic Hemisphere Pair (18in / 45cm)
items.description: Two hemispheres form the body sphere. 3D printed panels go on top.
items.note: BB-8 Builders Club recommends specific supplier

items.name: PLA Filament — white (1kg)
items.description: For BB-8 shell panels and internal brackets.

items.name: PLA Filament — orange (1kg)
items.description: For BB-8 orange accent panels. H2D prints multicolor.

items.name: MAX98357A I2S Amplifier
items.description: Tiny I2S DAC + amp. Play BB-8 chirps and audio feedback.

items.name: Small Speaker (3W, 4Ω, 40mm)
items.description: Compact speaker inside the sphere for sound effects.

items.name: INMP441 I2S MEMS Microphone
items.description: Digital mic for future voice commands.

items.name: RealSense D435i Depth Camera
items.description: Stereo depth + IMU for full SLAM. Add for autonomous path planning beyond ToF sensors.
items.note: Mount on head or inside body

items.name: Arducam ISX031 HDR Camera (3MP, 127° FOV)
items.description: Automotive-grade 120dB HDR. Swap for IMX477 if BB-8 goes outdoors.

items.name: RPLiDAR A1 (360° 2D LiDAR)
items.description: 360° laser scanner for robust SLAM mapping.

items.name: NeoPixel LED Ring (16 or 24 LEDs)
items.description: Addressable RGB LEDs for BB-8 eye glow and expressions.

items.name: Voltage Monitor / Battery Alarm
items.description: Beeps when LiPo voltage drops too low.
